audience: Chinese urban Gen Z and Millennials (18-35), modern festive aesthetic, premium-feel mobile content

sphere.concept: tiny 3D jade lucky charm with a gold knot tassel, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: polished jade green and metallic gold, bright rim highlight, transparent background, high contrast against cinnabar red bg

trump.concept: ornate Chinese red lantern with gold tassels and decorative pattern
trump.styleNotes: 3D rendered, glossy red lacquer and gold leaf, soft rim light, high contrast against cinnabar red bg

money.concept: traditional mooncake with intricate top relief pattern
money.styleNotes: 3D rendered pastry, golden brown crust, rich detail, food-photography lighting, high contrast against cinnabar red bg

poop.concept: decorative red and gold paper fan, partially open
poop.styleNotes: 3D rendered, red paper with gold ribs, subtle texture, high contrast against cinnabar red bg

cube.concept: Chinese red hongbao envelope with gold embossed dragon and tassel
cube.styleNotes: glossy 3D, red lacquer and metallic gold, isolated centered, transparent background

triangle.concept: traditional Chinese gold ingot yuanbao with embossed lucky character
triangle.styleNotes: 3D render, polished gold, isolated centered, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of a modern Chinese courtyard with dark red tile floor, scattered gold leaf accents, and faint bokeh of distant lanterns
background.styleNotes: premium painterly, soft red and gold palette, subtle bokeh, low contrast
background.paletteHint: cinnabar red, deep crimson, antique gold
